name: Reporting Center
description: Climate disclosure reporting workspace for CSRD and compliance reports with list browsing and guided report building.

page_briefs.reports: Reports library. A filter bar across the top narrows by framework (CSRD, TCFD, CDP), period, status, and owner. A data table lists each report with title, framework, reporting period, last updated, owner, status badge, and download action.
page_briefs.report-builder: Guided report builder. Structured form sections walk through framework selection, scope definition, disclosure topics, data sources, and narrative inputs. A live chart grid previews the generated figures and disclosures alongside the form so editors can validate numbers as they fill in sections.

shells.sidebar-main: Left navigation sidebar with primary content column
